title: Fix math question not displaying during gameplay

requirements.text: Fix the game screen so that the arithmetic problem (math question) is visibly rendered during active gameplay. The problem text must appear immediately when the game starts and update each time a new problem is fetched. Ensure the question display element is not hidden, has sufficient contrast against the dark background, and is not conditionally blocked by loading or undefined state. Verify the problem data from the backend hook (useGameState / useQueries generateProblem) is correctly read and passed to the rendered JSX in GameScreen.tsx.

quotes: I dont see the math question display

acceptanceCriteria: When the game starts, an arithmetic problem (e.g., '7 × 8 = ?') is displayed prominently on the game screen.
The problem text is visible against the dark background with sufficient contrast.
A new problem appears immediately after the player submits an answer (correct or incorrect).
The problem display does not remain blank or show undefined/null at any point during an active game session.
The problem is rendered in large, readable typography consistent with the bold visual theme.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Backend logic must remain in the single actor in backend/main.mo — do not alter the generateProblem endpoint unless it is the confirmed source of the bug.
nonGoals: Adding new game features or changing game rules.
Modifying the timer, scoring logic, or results screen.
Changing the visual theme or color palette.
